workspace.title: X Official Tools
workspace.subtitle: Validate and open an official X/Twitter post or X's account archive help. No non-API website automation is used.
workspace.initial_preview: Enable the matching child MOD to open an official post or account archive help.
workspace.wrong_site: Only official x.com or twitter.com status URLs are accepted.

ui.boundary: This MOD does not use non-API website automation, download post media, or read cookies.
ui.page_disabled: Enable the Official post page child MOD first.
ui.export_disabled: Enable the Account data archive child MOD first.
ui.invalid_url: The URL is not an allowed official X/Twitter post page.
ui.opened_page: The official X post was opened in the system browser.
ui.opened_export: X's official account-archive help was opened.
ui.browser_failed: The system browser could not be opened.

twitter.name: X parent MOD
twitter.purpose: Manage X official tools and their child MODs

twitter-page.name: Official post page
twitter-page.purpose: Validate an X/Twitter post URL and open it in the browser
twitter-page.control_location: X Official Tools → Open official post

twitter-export.name: Account data archive
twitter-export.purpose: Open X's official account-archive download help
twitter-export.control_location: X Official Tools → Official data archive
